title: Add task artifact writers for `TASKS.md` and `.hermes/tasks.json`
summary: Add task artifact writers for `TASKS.md` and `.hermes/tasks.json`
acceptanceCriteria: Task definitions include stable ids, title, phase, dependencies, acceptance criteria, risk, and status.
Review and work graph findings can be converted into task records.
Task artifacts can be written to Markdown and JSON outputs.
reviewNotes: Implemented in the Hermes OS native command, task-generation, dashboard, persistence, scheduled review, runtime policy, template registry, and execution-readiness work already recorded in docs/hermes-os-integration-log.md.
